mapper.select:
SELECT c.DDTEXT TABTEXT, a.TABNAME,a.FIELDNAME,a.DATATYPE,a.KEYFLAG,a.LENG ,CASE WHEN LENGTH(TRIM(b.SCRTEXT_M)) = 0 THEN b.DDTEXT ELSE b.SCRTEXT_M END DISPLAY_NAME ,b.SCRTEXT_M,b.DDTEXT FROM dd03l a LEFT JOIN dd04t b ON a.rollname = b.rollname AND b.ddlanguage = '1' LEFT JOIN dd02t c ON a.tabname = c.tabname AND c.as4local = 'A' AND c.ddlanguage = '1'
a.tabname = #{tableName}
AND a.as4local = 'A' AND a.FIELDNAME NOT LIKE '.%'
ORDER BY a.position

SELECT DISTINCT c.DDTEXT TABTEXT,a.TABNAME FROM dd03l a LEFT JOIN dd02t c ON a.tabname = c.tabname AND c.as4local = 'A' AND c.ddlanguage = '1'
c.DDTEXT LIKE '${keyword}%' OR a.TABNAME LIKE '${keyword}%'
